behavior_summary: U8P_LAMP1::look is the object's 'U8P_LAMP1::look' (examine) handler and simply displays a short description to the player: the single bark "wall lamp"; the process then suspends/returns to the engine.

U8P_LAMP1::use is a utility process that changes the world item at the lamp's location by calling FREE::changeItemType with the lamp instance coordinates (Item::getZ(this), Item::getY(this), Item::getX(this) - 0x20) and a target type id 0x025E — effectively replacing or toggling the lamp object in the map.
No global flags, menus, or branching logic are present; behavior is limited to inspect text and a single world-item transformation call.
notable_control_flow: U8P_LAMP1::look emits one bark ('wall lamp') and then suspends/ends — a minimal, linear examine flow.

U8P_LAMP1::use performs a single external call to FREE::changeItemType and contains no observed branching; control-flow artifacts in the raw are low-confidence and do not change the apparent linear behavior.
open_questions: Does the target item type 0x025E represent a different lamp state (toggle) or an unrelated replacement item? (inferred only)
Why is the X coordinate adjusted by subtracting 0x20 from Item::getX(this)? Is that a coordinate-system offset required by this map or an engine quirk?
What external triggers call U8P_LAMP1::use in gameplay (player 'U8P_LAMP1::use' action, scripted event, or other)? The script shows the handler but not its invocations.

main_function.name: U8P_LAMP1::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examination text for the lamp object (display 'wall lamp').
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player inspects or uses the 'U8P_LAMP1::look' action on the lamp object (engine U8P_LAMP1::look/examine event).
Function appears to suspend/return to the engine after showing the bark.

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP1::look
function_map.role: examine handler that emits a short description ('wall lamp')

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP1::use
function_map.role: utility to change/replace the map item at the lamp's coordinates (calls FREE::changeItemType)

external_calls.purpose: Change the map item at the lamp's coordinates to item type 0x025E using parameters: Item::getZ(this), Item::getY(this), Item::getX(this) - 0x20, 0x00, 0x025E, this. Purpose: replace or toggle the lamp instance in the world.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_LAMP1::look is the object's 'U8P_LAMP1::look' (examine) handler and simply displays a short description to the player: the single bark "wall lamp"; the process then suspends/returns to the engine.
